name: Kindergarten Homestead Lab — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for planning a simple household contribution and reflecting on care. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with planning a simple household contribution and reflecting on care.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.
